2605.25463.title: A Lightweight Hybrid Transformer-CRF Architecture for Multi-Type Bangla Medical Entity Recognition
2605.25463.paper_summary: MedER refers to the identification of medical entities. It is crucial for extracting structured clinical information from unstructured medical text. Many existing systems rely on transformer-based models, which are computationally expensive and difficult to deploy in resource-constrained environments. Furthermore, earlier works often use relaxed evaluation metrics that artificially inflate performance by rewarding correct prediction of dominant "Outside" (O) tokens. In this paper, we propose a lightweight Medical Entity Recognition (MedER) framework for the Bangla language. We establish a rigorous baseline using a 12-layer BanglaBERT model combined with a Conditional Random Field (CRF) layer for exact-boundary entity detection. To address deployment constraints, we compress this teacher model into a 4-layer student network through Knowledge Distillation (KD), where the student learns from the teacher's pre-CRF soft emission logits. Finally, we apply INT8 dynamic quantization to further reduce model size and inference cost. Our final quantized student achieves an 8.6x CPU speedup while requiring nearly 48 percent less storage than the CRF teacher model.
2605.25463.paper_summary_zh: MedER 指的是醫療實體的識別。這對於從非結構化醫療文本中提取結構化臨床信息至關重要。許多現有系統依賴於基於Transformer的模型，這些模型計算成本高且在資源有限的環境中難以部署。此外，早期的研究通常使用放寬的評估指標，這會通過獎勵對主導的「外部」(O) 標記的正確預測來人為提高性能。在本文中，我們提出了一個輕量級的醫療實體識別（MedER）框架，專為孟加拉語設計。我們使用一個 12 層的 BanglaBERT 模型結合條件隨機場（CRF）層來建立一個嚴格的基準，以進行精確邊界的實體檢測。為了解決部署限制，我們通過知識蒸餾（KD）將這個教師模型壓縮成一個 4 層的學生網絡，學生從教師的 pre-CRF 軟發射 logits 中學習。最後，我們應用 INT8 動態量化進一步減少模型大小和推理成本。我們最終的量化學生模型在 CPU 上實現了 8.6 倍的加速，同時所需的存儲空間比 CRF 教師模型減少了近 48%。
2605.25463.author: Peyal Saha et.al.
2605.25463.authors: Peyal Saha, Ahsanul Haque Hasib, Shoumik Barman Polok
